User Story
As a user of the Fish Export Service

I require the digital service to provide me with the ability to check if my data has been transferred to CATCH 

So that I am able to provide this information to the importer

 

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - Status column removed from completed documents table

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When the page loads

Then the table of Completed documents does not contain a Status column
